Event: Magic Training - Flying Hedgehog
Event Date: 23/12/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A100
Christmas Power

Triggers: 3 sec

Unstable Field
A special magic field appears around the unit. Every second over 3 sec, the following effects are triggered:
- All enemies take physical damage based on the distance to the artifact owner. The greater the distance, the less damage (max: 200000, min: 66000).
All allies restore health based on the distance to the artifact owner. The greater the distance, the less health will be restored (max: 125000, min: 41250).
The following effects are also active while the field is active:
- 2 allies closest to the artifact owner become immune to debuffs, and their physical and magic armor piercing and accuracy are increased by 50% for 3 sec.
- 2 enemies closest to the artifact owner cannot gain buffs and start to miss with a 50% chance when attacking.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
